hero.eyebrow: The Courage to Know Yourself · The Grace to Feel Everything
hero.title: Where Latex
hero.subtitle: Intimacy that begins from within — private, fearless, yours alone.
hero.description: VeletSolo is named for latex that feels like velvet against skin — and for the quiet courage it takes to face your deepest desires in private. Premium power-exchange collections, trusted by {customerCount} adults across the United States.

story.heading: The Name That

paragraphs.text: — a deliberate echo of velvet. Because the finest latex, worn close, feels exactly like that: impossibly smooth, second-skin warm, a luxury that exists only between you and yourself.
— because the truest act of desire is a private one. It takes courage to look inward, to name what you want, to stop apologizing for the textures that move you.

story.quote: VeletSolo exists for the moment before anyone else is in the room — the moment you decide to be honest with yourself.
story.closingText: We build for that courage. Every piece is crafted for sensation, safety, and the quiet luxury of knowing yourself completely.
story.labelQuote: "Latex that feels like velvet. Desire you finally stop hiding."

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know — answered with the same discretion we bring to everything we do.

items.question: Will anyone know what I ordered? How discreet is your packaging?
items.answer: Completely discreet — always. Every order ships in a plain, unmarked outer box with zero indication of the contents. Your billing statement will show "VS Commerce LLC" — never VeletSolo, never any adult-related description. The return address label is equally neutral. We've designed every step of our fulfilment process so that your purchase stays entirely your business.

items.question: Where do you ship? How long does delivery take?
items.answer:
VeletSolo ships to all 50 US states. Orders are processed within 1–2 business days and typically arrive within 3–7 business days via standard shipping. Expedited options are available at checkout. Free standard shipping on all orders over $79.

International shipping is not currently available, but we're working on it — join our newsletter to be notified when your region opens up.

items.question: Do you sell or share my personal data?
items.answer: Never. Your personal information is used solely to process and deliver your order. We do not sell, rent, or share customer data with any third party for marketing purposes. Our site uses SSL encryption and industry-standard security protocols. You can request deletion of your account data at any time by contacting our support team.

items.question: Are your products body-safe? What materials do you use?
items.answer:
Body safety is non-negotiable for us. Every product in our catalogue is made from body-safe, phthalate-free materials — including medical-grade stainless steel, dermatologically tested latex, food-grade silicone, and non-toxic wax blends. We vet every supplier and material for extended skin contact before listing anything on the site.

Our chastity devices are made from surgical-grade 304 stainless steel. Our latex pieces undergo dermatological testing and are free from harmful accelerators where possible. Full material specs are listed on each individual product page.

items.question: How do I choose the right size for a chastity device?
items.answer:
Sizing is the most important factor for comfort and safety in chastity wear. Each chastity product page includes a detailed sizing guide with measurement instructions. As a general rule:

Ring size — measure the circumference at the base in its resting state, then refer to our ring size chart. Most first-time wearers size up slightly for comfort.
Cage length — measure flaccid length. The cage should not be so long that it causes bunching, nor so short that it causes restriction when flaccid.
Cage diameter — measure flaccid girth and match to the interior cage diameter.

If you're between sizes, our support team is happy to advise — no judgment, just practical help.

items.question: What is your return and refund policy?
items.answer:
We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee on all unopened, unused products in their original packaging. To initiate a return, contact our support team within 30 days of delivery. Once we receive and inspect the item, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to your original payment method.

For hygiene reasons, we are unable to accept returns on opened or used items. Latex garments that have been worn are also non-returnable. If a product arrives damaged or defective, we will replace it at no charge — please contact us within 7 days with photos.
